primary_blocker: Wife not aligned with the decision
key_intelligence: ABROAD with spousal blocker (wife not aligned). Abandoned. PATTERN: Two-person ABROAD decisions are particularly high-risk when the absent partner is not bought in. The absent partner typically has more anxiety about remote property management. Design follow-up for the absent partner's specific concerns (damage, security, control).
